zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Corneliszen Losee於大約1625年出生在荷蘭藍德福利辛根時，他的父親Cornelius B. Loosje30歲，母親Anna Katerinia Kouk28歲。他於1644年5月29日與Janneken Pieters在荷蘭藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布申維其可享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Corneliszen Losee于大约1625年出生在荷兰藍德福利辛根时，他的父亲Cornelius B. Loosje30岁，母亲Anna Katerinia Kouk28岁。他于1644年5月29日与Janneken Pieters在荷兰藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布申維其可享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Losee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose (see   Loose  ) or Loosey. This name was established in the Hudson valley in the 18th century.

variants.name: Loose
meanings: English: habitational name from Loose in Kent or Suffolk, both named from Old English hlōse ‘pigsty’.
Flemish (De Loose) and Dutch: variant of Loos 3.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.
After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Kings, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Corneliszen Losee was born about 1625, in Vlissingen, Zeeland, Netherlands, his father, Cornelius B. Loosje, was 30 and his mother, Anna Katerinia Kouk, was 28. He married Janneken Pieters on 29 May 1644, in Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1687, in Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Corneliszen Losee est né environ 1625, à Vlissingen, Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Cornelius B. Loosje, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Katerinia Kouk, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Janneken Pieters le 29 mai 1644, à Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1687, à Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Corneliszen Losee um 1625 in Vlissingen, Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cornelius B. Loosje 30 und seine Mutter Anna Katerinia Kouk 28. Er hat am 29. Mai 1644 in Seeland, Niederlande Janneken Pieters geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1687 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Corneliszen Losee è nato il circa 1625 nel Vlissingen, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Cornelius B. Loosje, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anna Katerinia Kouk, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Janneken Pieters il 29 maggio 1644, nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1687, nel Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Corneliszen Loseeが約1625年にオランダゼエランドvリシンジェンで生まれた時，父Cornelius B. Loosjeは30歳，母Anna Katerinia Koukは28歳であった。1644年5月29日にオランダゼエランドでJanneken Pietersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズブシュウィックで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Corneliszen Losee(이)가 대략 1625년 네덜란드 제랜드 블리징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cornelius B. Loosje(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Katerinia Kouk(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1644년 5월 29일 네덜란드 제랜드에서 Janneken Pieters(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 부슈윅에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Corneliszen Losee nasceu aproximadamente 1625, em Vlissingen, Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Cornelius B. Loosje, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Katerinia Kouk, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Janneken Pieters em 29 de maio de 1644, em Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1687, em Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Corneliszen Losee родился около 1625 г. в местности влиссинген, зиланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Cornelius B. Loosje было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Katerinia Kouk, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Janneken Pieters 29 мая 1644 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1687 г. в местности бушвикк, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Corneliszen Losee nació aproximadamente 1625, en Vlissingen, Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Cornelius B. Loosje, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Katerinia Kouk, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Janneken Pieters el 29 de mayo de 1644, en Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1687, en Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
